reviews.comment:
El personal de playa y el de la parte de comida excelente. Ahora el personal de LIMPIEZA DEL BAÑO una soberbia y mal educada la empleada. Haciendo esperar varios minutos porque estaba "limpiando" se supone, cuando solo estaba charlando con su compañera sin realizar su trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
The beach and food staff were excellent. However, the bathroom cleaning staff—one employee was incredibly rude and arrogant. She made us wait several minutes because she was supposedly "cleaning," when in reality she was just chatting with her colleague and not doing her job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4b0l2NmtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para tomar café... Por otro lado deje el auto y me pegue una escapada a la feria del libro a 2 cuadras,  cuando volví el de seguridad me dijo que no puedo dejar el auto e irme, le indicó que fue un momento y que ahora iba a consumir dentro del recinto y de mala gana me indicó que le da igual, Nose que ley o cartel indica que en el sector de estacionamiento podes estar equis cantidad de tiempo, la verdad yo no lo vi... lo peor casi todos los espacios de estacionamiento estan ocupados por los vehiculos de los trabajadores del lugar.. En fin hipocresía..

(Translated by Google)
Good place to have coffee... On the other hand, I left the car and went to the book fair 2 blocks away. When I came back, the security guard told me that I can't leave the car and go. I told him that it was just a moment and that I was going to consume inside the premises and reluctantly he told me that he didn't care. I don't know what law or sign says that you can stay in the parking lot for a certain amount of time. I honestly didn't see it... The worst thing is that almost all the parking spaces are occupied by the vehicles of the workers there... In short, hypocrisy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSOVlfSldREAE
